Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Frontend Engineer position at Sea. I saw that your team is bridging the gap between LLMs and practical product features. This caught my attention because I spend most of my time building tools where AI does the heavy lifting, not just basic chatbots.

I built ValoFenua, a full-stack React app with Supabase and PostgreSQL. It uses a daily scraper for 1,300 listings and an AI agent to calculate market price ranges. I also built a personal job search pipeline using n8n and an MCP server to automate complex data workflows. At my current role at EXAIL Robotics, I develop UI features in JavaScript and C++ for eye-tracking systems.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days for each new setup. I automated it so it now takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time through better automated tools.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I am excited about the chance to apply my experience with React and prompt engineering to improve Sea's HQ Finance data systems.
